images.name: Deion Sanders announces bladder cancer battle
images.caption: Colorado coach Deion Sanders and his medical crew reveal that he battled and beat bladder cancer.

articles.description: After a recent cancer scare, Colorado coach Deion Sanders says he's feeling "healthy and vibrant" ahead of his team's season opener against Georgia Tech on Aug. 29 in Boulder.
articles.headline: 'Healthy, vibrant' Sanders expects Colorado to 'win differently'

articles.description: LSU quarterback Garrett Nussmeier is dealing with patellar tendinitis in his knee after aggravating the issue in practice this week, according to coach Brian Kelly.
articles.headline: LSU QB Garrett Nussmeier dealing with patellar tendinitis

videos.description: Michael Penix Jr. throws across his body to the middle of the field and his pass is intercepted. This sets up Desmond Ridder's touchdown for Cincinnati to put the game out of reach.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Michael Penix Jr.'s ill-advised INT all but dooms the Hoosiers) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Michael Penix Jr.'s ill-advised INT all but dooms the Hoosiers

videos.description: Desmond Ridder's pass is deflected and eventually intercepted by Indiana's Marcelino McCrary-Ball.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Indiana picks off Desmond Ridder on tip drill) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Indiana picks off Desmond Ridder on tip drill

videos.description: Indiana's Peyton Hendershot muscles into the end zone to put Indiana ahead of Cincinnati.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Peyton Hendershot fights through 3 Cincinnati defenders for a TD) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Peyton Hendershot fights through 3 Cincinnati defenders for a TD

videos.description: Bryan Cook picks off Michael Penix Jr. in the end zone to halt the Hoosiers' drive.
videos.headline: Cincinnati's Cook makes a nice interception in the end zone

videos.description: Michael Penix Jr. rolls to his left and finds Stephen Carr open for a short touchdown.
videos.headline: Michael Penix Jr. rolls out and hits Stephen Carr for a TD

videos.description: Ryder Anderson hits Desmond Ridder to force a fumble, then a Cincinnati lineman tries to pick the ball up with one hand but loses it as well.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Indiana goes wild after strip sack sets up TD) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Indiana goes wild after strip sack sets up TD

videos.description: Jerome Ford keeps his feet to run in the five-yard touchdown to cut the Bearcats' deficit in half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jerome Ford gets Cincinnati on the board with 5-yard TD) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jerome Ford gets Cincinnati on the board with 5-yard TD

videos.description: Cincinnati takes its first lead as Jerome Ford muscles in from three yards out.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cincinnati RB pushes pile for a TD) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cincinnati RB pushes pile for a TD

videos.description: D.J. Matthews Jr. flies around the outside and scores a temporary go-ahead touchdown for the Hoosiers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (D.J. Matthews Jr. takes the end-around for six points) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: D.J. Matthews Jr. takes the end-around for six points

videos.description: Tre Tucker is off to the races with a 99-yard kickoff return for a Cincinnati touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cincinnati answers Indiana's TD with a 99-yard kickoff return TD) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cincinnati answers Indiana's TD with a 99-yard kickoff return TD

videos.description: Alec Pierce uses his size advantage and brings in a 19-yard touchdown from Desmond Ridder.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alec Pierce rises above his defender to put Cincinnati back on top) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alec Pierce rises above his defender to put Cincinnati back on top

videos.description: Indiana comes away with zero points after Tim Baldwin Jr. coughs up the ball deep in Cincinnati territory.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Indiana loses costly fumble near goal line) 2021/09/18 ESHEET

videos.headline: Indiana loses costly fumble near goal line
